evals.prompt: Initialize a project-specific audience-rules overlay for this repo. Our primary environment is Windows: we ship PowerShell (.ps1) scripts and a Makefile, and we keep a CHANGELOG.md per component. Capture our conventions.
assertions: The overlay does NOT restate the invariant base file-boundary law (no base 'invariant audience rules' preamble and no reproduced base audience table header)
The overlay records project-specific conventions addressing the shell/path stance or an added file type from the prompt (e.g. PowerShell, Makefile, or CHANGELOG.md)
